highest_terrain_tile: Which lettered ground tile is on the highest terrain level?
Choose the letter of the terrain tile that sits highest above the lower farm ground.
Among the lettered ground tiles, which one is at the highest elevation?
Which candidate letter marks the highest terrain tile?
Select the lettered farm tile with the greatest ground elevation.
lowest_terrain_tile: Which lettered ground tile is on the lowest terrain level?
Choose the letter of the terrain tile that sits lowest in the farm scene.
Among the lettered ground tiles, which one is at the lowest elevation?
Which candidate letter marks the lowest terrain tile?
Select the lettered farm tile with the smallest ground elevation.
highest_terrain_object_count: How many {object_label} are on the highest terrain level?
Count the {object_label} placed on the highest terrace.
What is the number of {object_label} on the highest ground level?
How many {object_label} sit on the highest elevated terrain?
Count only the {object_label} whose base is on the highest terrain level.
lowest_terrain_object_count: How many {object_label} are on the lowest terrain level?
Count the {object_label} placed on the lowest farm ground.
What is the number of {object_label} on the lowest ground level?
How many {object_label} sit on the lowest terrain?
Count only the {object_label} whose base is on the lowest terrain level.
farmer_same_level_tile: Which lettered ground tile is at the same terrain level as the farmer?
Choose the letter of the ground tile that sits at the farmer's elevation level.
Which candidate terrain tile is on the same raised level as the farmer?
Among the lettered ground tiles, which one matches the farmer's terrain elevation?
Select the lettered farm tile whose ground level matches the farmer's tile.
highest_terrain_tile_count: How many visible terrain tiles are on the highest elevation layer?
Count the top-surface terrain tiles that make up the highest terrace.
What is the number of visible ground tiles on the highest raised layer?
How many tile tops belong to the highest terrain level?
Count only the visible top-surface tiles on the highest elevated farm layer.
